jobs.purpose: Atomic transition draft → open. Verifies every line has tax_calculation_id (dispatching CalculateInvoiceTaxJob for any that don't when tax module supports async). Recomputes + freezes subtotal_cents / discount_amount_cents / tax_amount_cents / total_cents. Sets amount_due_cents. Dispatches GenerateInvoicePDFJob + SendInvoiceEmailJob on success.
steps: Load invoice + lock FOR UPDATE (SELECT ... FOR UPDATE inside a transaction — the observer will refuse concurrent updates)
Refuse when invoice.status != 'draft' (idempotency)
Refuse when line_count == 0
Load every invoice_line for this invoice + verify tax_calculation_id present on lines with item_type IN ('membership_charge', 'addon', 'setup_fee', 'one_time_service')
When any line lacks tax_calculation_id AND tax module supports_async_calculation: dispatch CalculateInvoiceTaxJob for that line + re-enqueue FinalizeInvoiceJob with delay=30s (poll for readiness)
When any line lacks tax_calculation_id AND tax module does NOT support async: refuse + log warning
Recompute subtotal_cents = SUM(line.subtotal_cents)
Recompute discount_amount_cents = SUM(line.discount_amount_cents)
Recompute tax_amount_cents = SUM(line.tax_amount_cents)
Recompute total_cents = subtotal_cents - discount_amount_cents + tax_amount_cents
Recompute amount_due_cents = total_cents - amount_paid_cents
Transition status draft → open (this fires InvoiceFinalized via the observer)
Dispatch GenerateInvoicePDFJob + SendInvoiceEmailJob after commit

jobs.purpose: Render the invoice PDF via DomPDF using the appropriate template (default Stackra template on Small tier; tenant-branded on Medium+ with invoice_tenant_branded_pdf entitlement). Uploads to S3 + sets invoices.pdf_url. Idempotent — regenerates on demand.
steps: Load invoice + lines + billing_address + shipping_address + customer_tax_id + tenant.branding when entitlement holds
Select template: 'stackra-default' when invoice_tenant_branded_pdf gate is closed; 'tenant-branded' otherwise
Render HTML via Blade template with invoice + line data + tenant branding
Convert HTML → PDF via DomPDF (server-side; embeds fonts; ~200-500ms typical)
Upload to S3 at path `invoices/{tenant_id}/{yyyy}/{invoice_id}.pdf` with SSE-KMS encryption
Generate signed S3 URL with 7-day TTL (regenerated on each viewer request via a dedicated signing service)
Update invoices.pdf_url = signed URL + updated_at

jobs.purpose: Deliver the invoice email to customer.email with the PDF attached. Waits for GenerateInvoicePDFJob to complete (polls invoices.pdf_url up to 3 times with 30s delay). Delegates rendering + delivery to notifications module.
steps: Load invoice + verify status='open'
Refuse when invoice.sent_at IS NOT NULL AND !force (idempotency for the initial send)
Refuse when invoice.pdf_url IS NULL — dispatch GenerateInvoicePDFJob + re-enqueue this job with delay=30s (poll)
Dispatch InvoiceSentNotification via notifications module (email + in_app channels; SMS for Enterprise via slack_alerts feature)
Attach PDF as email attachment (downloaded from S3 signed URL)
Update invoice.sent_at = now()
Fire InvoiceSent

jobs.purpose: Nightly sweep. Finds invoices where due_date < now() AND status IN ('open', 'partially_paid') AND status != 'past_due' → transitions to 'past_due' + fires InvoicePastDue (which kicks off the dunning ladder).
steps: SELECT id FROM invoices WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('open', 'partially_paid') AND due_date < now() FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 5000
For each: transition status → past_due (the observer computes days_past_due + fires InvoicePastDue + dispatches DispatchDunningRemindersJob)
Emit stackra.invoice.marked_past_due_total metric

jobs.purpose: Per-invoice per-cadence dunning notification dispatch. Fires the appropriate reminder at day+3 / day+7 / day+14 / day+30 / day+60 past due. Enterprise tenants with invoice_dunning_advanced entitlement may override the cadence via settings.
steps: Load invoice; refuse when status NOT IN ('past_due', 'partially_paid') — the customer may have paid meanwhile
Compute days_past_due = today - due_date
Load tenant's dunning schedule (default from data/dunning-schedule-catalog.json; overridable when invoice_dunning_advanced holds)
Determine which cadence stage matches days_past_due (day_3 / day_7 / day_14 / day_30 / day_60)
Refuse when this stage was already dispatched (check dunning_dispatched_stages jsonb column)
Fire InvoiceDunningStarted on first-ever dispatch; else InvoiceDunningEscalated with the stage
Dispatch InvoicePastDueNotification (customer) via notifications module
Record the stage in dunning_dispatched_stages jsonb + set collection_status='in_dunning'
When days_past_due >= config('invoice.collection.send_to_collections_after_days', 60) AND tenant holds invoice_collections_integration: dispatch EscalateDunningToCollectionsJob

jobs.purpose: Enterprise-only. Hands off a past-due invoice to a third-party collections agency after the dunning ladder is exhausted (default 60 days). Delegates to the notifications module's collections integration.
steps: Load invoice + tenant + verify invoice_collections_integration entitlement
Refuse when collection_status != 'in_dunning' OR days_past_due < config('invoice.collection.send_to_collections_after_days')
Load tenant's configured collections_agency (from settings)
Dispatch to the agency's API via the notifications::CollectionsIntegration facade (HTTP POST with invoice details, customer details, amount_due, currency)
Update invoice.collection_status='with_collections' + collection_agency_ref = agency's returned reference ID
Fire InvoiceSentToCollections
Dispatch InvoiceSentToCollectionsNotification (customer + admin)

jobs.purpose: Nightly sweep. Recomputes invoices.amount_paid_cents from the transactions module's ledger (SUM of transactions where invoice_id = ? AND type='payment' AND status='completed'). Detects drift between the invoice and the transaction module (should be zero in a healthy system).
steps: SELECT id FROM invoices WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('void', 'draft') AND updated_at > now() - interval '48 hours' LIMIT 10000 (only recent invoices — full-history reconciliation is expensive)
For each: query transactions where transactions.invoice_id = invoice.id AND type='payment' AND status='completed'; compute SUM(transaction.amount_cents)
When SUM != invoice.amount_paid_cents: emit stackra.invoice.reconcile.drift_detected_total metric (P1 signal) + update invoice.amount_paid_cents = SUM
Recompute amount_due_cents = total_cents - amount_paid_cents
When amount_paid_cents == total_cents AND status != 'paid': transition status → paid (fires InvoicePaid via observer)
When 0 < amount_paid_cents < total_cents AND status != 'partially_paid': transition status → partially_paid

jobs.purpose: Dispatched by InvoiceLineObserver when a line is created without tax_calculation_id. Delegates to the tax module's TaxResolver (jurisdiction lookup + rate application). Sets invoice_line.tax_calculation_id + tax_amount_cents.
steps: Load invoice_line + parent invoice + parent billing_address + tenant
Refuse when parent invoice.status != 'draft' (post-finalize tax is frozen)
Delegate to tax::TaxResolver::calculateFor(billing_address, unit_price_cents, quantity, item_type) → returns TaxCalculation row
Update invoice_line.tax_calculation_id = calc.id + tax_amount_cents = calc.amount_cents
Recompute invoice_line.total_cents = subtotal_cents - discount_amount_cents + tax_amount_cents

jobs.purpose: Applies a reserved coupon redemption to a draft invoice. Creates a discount_line + updates the invoice's discount_amount_cents. Delegates to the coupon module's redemption transition (reserved → applied).
steps: Load invoice + coupon_redemption + verify same-tenant
Refuse when invoice.status != 'draft' OR coupon_redemption.status != 'reserved'
Compute discount_amount_cents from coupon.discount_type + discount_value applied to invoice.subtotal_cents (percent) or fixed_amount (flat)
Insert invoice_line row with item_type='discount_line', quantity=1, unit_price_cents=-discount_amount_cents (negative), coupon_redemption_id=redemption.id
Transition coupon_redemption.status reserved → applied via coupon module
Recompute invoice totals

jobs.purpose: Dispatched by refund module on refund.issued. Creates a CreditNote row referencing the original invoice + amount + reason + issued_by_user. The observer fires CreditNoteCreated + enqueues GenerateCreditNotePDFJob.
steps: Load original_invoice + refund + verify original_invoice.status IN ('paid', 'partially_paid', 'refunded', 'disputed')
Compute amount_cents = refund.amount_cents (positive representation)
Compute tax_amount_cents proportionally (via observer)
Insert credit_notes row: original_invoice_id, reason='refund', amount_cents, currency=original_invoice.currency, issued_by_user_id=refund.actor_user_id, status='draft'
The CreditNoteObserver.creating fires CreditNoteCreated + generates credit_note_number + dispatches GenerateCreditNotePDFJob

jobs.purpose: Render the credit note PDF (same template family as invoice; different header + negative-total presentation). Uploads to S3 + transitions status draft → issued.
steps: Load credit_note + original_invoice + tenant.branding when entitlement holds
Select template: 'credit-note-default' or 'credit-note-tenant-branded'
Render HTML → PDF via DomPDF
Upload to S3 at path `credit-notes/{tenant_id}/{yyyy}/{credit_note_id}.pdf` with SSE-KMS encryption
Update credit_notes.pdf_url = signed URL
Transition status draft → issued (fires CreditNoteIssued via observer)
Dispatch CreditNoteIssuedNotification (customer)

jobs.purpose: Weekly sweep. Applies the per-entity retention windows: invoices > 7 years (10 for Enterprise) → migrate to compliance archive; invoice_lines cascaded via FK RESTRICT; credit_notes 7-10 years then archive; PDFs migrate from S3 hot storage to S3 Glacier cold storage after 7 years. TenantErased cascade preserves financial records in the compliance archive.
steps: Load config('invoice.retention.invoice_years', 7) — Enterprise with invoice_extended_retention: 10
SELECT id FROM invoices WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at < now() - interval '7 years' AND status IN ('paid', 'void', 'refunded', 'written_off') LIMIT 5000
For each: emit to compliance archive (S3 Glacier + audit trail metadata); do NOT hard-delete the DB row (audit history depends on the FK RESTRICT chain surviving)

For invoices > 10 years past created_at AND tenant lacks invoice_extended_retention: hard-delete (cascades to invoice_lines via FK RESTRICT — but CreditNote may hold the reference, so the delete must fail cleanly + move to archive instead)
Migrate PDFs from S3 hot to S3 Glacier for invoices > 7 years old
credit_notes NEVER auto-hard-deleted — retained indefinitely (financial audit for the tenant's lifetime + beyond) unless tenant is erased
